---
title: "GarnerChildersMuhimpundu_FinalProject"
author: "Seth Garner, Gavin Childers, Julie Muhimpundu"
date: "2026-04-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "..")
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
sleep_df <- read_csv("data/sleep_data.csv")
#sleep_df
names(sleep_df)
```
# Probability Distribution

## Qualitative Data

For this section, the qualitative variable is "sleep disorder". Success is defined as "None".
```{r}
sleep_df %>%
  count(`Sleep Disorder`) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))
```

## Quantitative Data

For this section, the quantitative variable is "sleep duration".

```{r}
sleep_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(sample = `Sleep Duration`)) +
  stat_qq() +
  stat_qq_line(color = "red")

sleep_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Sleep Duration`)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```
